The least number of temporary variables required to create a three-address code in static single assignment form for the expression a + b * c + b * c + a is __________________.

Consider the following code segment. x = u - t; y = x * v; x = y + w; y = t - z; y = x * y; The minimum number of total variables required to convert the above code segment to static single assignment form is __________.

Consider the following intermediate program in three address code: p = a - b q = p * c p = u * v q = p + q Which one of the following corresponds to a static single assignment form of the above code? A. p1 = a - b q1 = p
